title: Quantitative assessment of domestic chicken (Gallus gallus) egg proteins with high allergenic potential in pasta with LC/MS/MS
author: Veterinary Scientific Committee
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The method LC/MS/MS for the quantitative detection of the main allergens of hen egg white (ovalbumin, ovotransferrin, lysozym, apovitellenin and vitellogenin) in pasta has been developed. Moreover it is necessary to investigate the bigger amount of samples and to determine the detection limit for the identification of egg white allergens with the help of the external standard. We suppose that after that the method will be ready for the control purposes of food supervising institutions in the Czech Republic.
steps_raw: The method LC/MS/MS for the quantitative detection of the main allergens of hen egg white (ovalbumin, ovotransferrin, lysozym, apovitellenin and vitellogenin) in pasta has been developed. We suppose that after that the method will be ready for the control purposes of food supervising institutions in the Czech Republic.
